calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Joe Vickstein. Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Gordon Kenny Realty, and Defendant James McLaughlin appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
